ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last maintained */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the sensor */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "acc_x" REAL /* Acceleration on the X-axis */,
  "acc_y" REAL /* Acceleration on the Y-axis */,
  "acc_z" REAL /* Acceleration on the Z-axis */,
  "light_level" INTEGER /* Light level reading */,
  "voice_level" REAL /* Voice level reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, data analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_log_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., noise, light) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "alert_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was triggered */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., acknowledged, unresolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_aggregates" (
  "aggregate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data aggregate */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the aggregation period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the aggregation period */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value of the data during the aggregation period */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the data during the aggregation period */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the data during the aggregation period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_aggregates_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Generated report data */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "model_data" TEXT /* Trained model data */,
  "trained_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model output */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that generated the output */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data for the model */,
  "output_data" TEXT /* Generated output data */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the output was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)
